items.name: Yūrei Shell
items.description:
The Yūrei Shell, a sleek, porcelain-like mask, once lost to time, was discovered by a hacker who, upon wearing it, was thrust into a digital and real in-between space. With its smooth surface, segmented panels, and lifelike features, the mask’s black, glassy eyes revealed forgotten memories and data, but the more she used it, the more she felt her identity slip away. The Yūrei Shell wasn’t just a tool—it fused with her, blurring the lines between her and the mask until she became a vessel for something far greater, a collective consciousness. As the neon city outside flickered, the mask waited for its next wearer, ready to transform them forever.

ཐི ♱ ཋྀ

items.name: Green Alien Gir Ushanka w/ Long Scene Hair (Black)
items.description:
👽🛸

🌟Dont forget to Like the Item🌟

Unique alien ushanka hair featuring a green alien Gir-style ushanka with long scene hair for a bold, alternative look. This ushanka hat with hair blends a playful alien hood style with long scene hair, making it perfect for scene outfits, emo avatars, alt looks, and nostalgic roleplay. Designed as a hat with hair accessory, it works great for aesthetic outfits, photos, and standing out in lobbies with a fun green alien vibe.
